expectations.evidence: Part 4 template groups by SDK Config, Identity, Events, Push, Additional.
Per-flow table and common issues list in Part 4.2.

notes: With-skill runs achieve 100% pass rate across all 3 evals vs ~83% baseline.
The +17% pass rate improvement comes from skill-specific assertions (loading reference files, entering correct mode).
Baseline performs well on domain knowledge (CleverTap APIs) since the model already knows CleverTap.
With-skill runs use ~45% more tokens and ~36% more time due to reading reference files.
The skill's primary value is structured workflows (mode detection, reference loading, audit templates) rather than raw SDK knowledge.
